name: machine-i2c
description: I2C (Inter-Integrated Circuit) bus communication. Both hardware I2C (machine.I2C) and software/bit-banged (machine.SoftI2C) available. ESP32 has 2 hardware I2C peripherals.
differences_from_cpython: Does NOT exist in CPython. MicroPython-specific I2C interface.

classes.name: SoftI2C
classes.description: Software (bit-banged) I2C. Works on any GPIO pins. Slightly slower than hardware I2C.

constructor_params.name: freq
constructor_params.description: I2C clock frequency in Hz. Default 400000 (400KHz). Use 100000 for longer wires.

constructor_params.name: timeout
constructor_params.description: I2C operation timeout in microseconds. Default 50000 (50ms).

methods.name: I2C.init
methods.description: Initialize I2C peripheral.

methods.name: I2C.scan
methods.description: Scan I2C bus for devices. Returns list of 7-bit addresses.

methods.name: I2C.start
methods.description: Generate START condition on I2C bus.

methods.name: I2C.stop
methods.description: Generate STOP condition on I2C bus.

methods.name: I2C.readinto
methods.description: Read bytes into buffer. nack=True sends NACK after last byte.

methods.name: I2C.write
methods.description: Write bytes to I2C bus.

methods.name: I2C.readfrom
methods.description: Read nbytes from device at addr. Returns bytes object.

methods.name: I2C.readfrom_into
methods.description: Read into buffer from device at addr.

methods.name: I2C.readfrom_mem
methods.description: Read from memory register of I2C device.

methods.name: I2C.readfrom_mem_into
methods.description: Read from memory register into buffer.

methods.name: I2C.writeto
methods.description: Write bytes to device at addr.

methods.name: I2C.writeto_mem
methods.description: Write to memory register of I2C device.

methods.name: I2C.writevto
methods.description: Scattered write from vector of buffers to device at addr.

classes.name: I2C
classes.description: Hardware I2C. ESP32 has two hardware I2C peripherals (id=0, id=1). Faster and more reliable than SoftI2C.

methods.name: I2C.init
methods.description: Initialize I2C peripheral.

methods.name: I2C.scan
methods.description: Scan I2C bus for devices. Returns list of 7-bit addresses.

methods.name: I2C.start
methods.description: Generate START condition on I2C bus.

methods.name: I2C.stop
methods.description: Generate STOP condition on I2C bus.

methods.name: I2C.readinto
methods.description: Read bytes into buffer. nack=True sends NACK after last byte.

methods.name: I2C.write
methods.description: Write bytes to I2C bus.

methods.name: I2C.readfrom
methods.description: Read nbytes from device at addr. Returns bytes object.

methods.name: I2C.readfrom_into
methods.description: Read into buffer from device at addr.

methods.name: I2C.readfrom_mem
methods.description: Read from memory register of I2C device.

methods.name: I2C.readfrom_mem_into
methods.description: Read from memory register into buffer.

methods.name: I2C.writeto
methods.description: Write bytes to device at addr.

methods.name: I2C.writeto_mem
methods.description: Write to memory register of I2C device.

methods.name: I2C.writevto
methods.description: Scattered write from vector of buffers to device at addr.

shared_methods.name: I2C.scan

returns.description: List of 7-bit I2C addresses found on the bus.

shared_methods.description: Scan I2C bus for devices. Returns list of addresses.

shared_methods.name: I2C.readfrom
shared_methods.description: Read nbytes from given I2C address. Convenience method.

shared_methods.name: I2C.writeto
shared_methods.description: Write bytes to address. Convenience method.

shared_methods.name: I2C.writevto
shared_methods.description: Write bytes from sequence to address.

shared_methods.name: I2C.readfrom_mem
shared_methods.description: Read from register memaddr at device addr.

shared_methods.name: I2C.writeto_mem
shared_methods.description: Write to register memaddr at device addr.

example:
from machine import Pin, I2C, SoftI2C

# Hardware I2C (uses I2C0 peripheral)
i2c = I2C(0, scl=Pin(22), sda=Pin(21), freq=100000)

# Software I2C (any pins)
# i2c = SoftI2C(scl=Pin(22), sda=Pin(21), freq=100000)

devices = i2c.scan()
print('I2C devices found:', [hex(addr) for addr in devices])

# Read from SSD1306 OLED (addr 0x3C)
if 0x3c in devices:
    i2c.writeto(0x3c, b'\x00\xAE')  # display off cmd

# Read register from sensor
# data = i2c.readfrom_mem(0x76, 0xD0, 2)  # read 2 bytes from register 0xD0
esp32_notes: Hardware I2C id=0 uses pins 18,19 or 21,22. id=1 uses pins 25,26 or 32,33.
Default SDA/SCL on most ESP32 dev boards: 21/22 (I2C0).
SoftI2C works on any GPIO pins — essential when default pins conflict.
Standard I2C speeds: 100KHz (standard), 400KHz (fast). ESP32 also supports 1MHz+.
I2C requires external pull-up resistors (typically 4.7kΩ to 3.3V) on SDA and SCL.
